CV

My full name is Henry David Llerena Montenegro, sometimes you could find me as Henry instead of David.

Education

  • October 2021 - present :
    Pursuing a PhD in Mathematics, Université Paris-Saclay, Laboratoire de Mathématiques et Modélisation d'Évry.
    Thesis title: Concentration of singularities for dissipative solutions of the Navier-Stokes equations and interdependence of variables for some fluid mechanics equations.
    Advisors: Diego Chamorro and Pierre-Gilles Lemarié-Rieusset.
  • 2019 - 2021 :
    Master degree in Mathematics, M2 AAG, Université Paris Saclay site Orsay.
    Master thesis: Étude de la régularité pour quelques équations de la mécanique des fluides.
  • 2013 - 2018 :
    BSc in Applied Mathematics, Universidad Central del Ecuador
    Thesis: Aproximate identities in the Schwarzs spaces.

Given talks, posters and seminars

2023:
  • Vulgarization seminar for master students M1 MEEF from Université Paris-Saclay, October, Evry-France.
  • Poster session at "New trends in mathematical fluids dynamics", June, Grenoble-France, poster
  • Séminaire des doctorants en EDP, LMO, Orsay-France.
  • Séminaire des doctorants, LaMME, Evry-France.
  • Poster session at "Journées de jeunes EDPistes", Tours-France.
2022:
  • Partial regularity theory for the micropolar fluids equations, Conferencia internacional en analisis y ecuaciones en derivadas parciales, April, Quito- Ecuador

Attended conferences and worshops

2023:
  • New trends in mathematical fluids dynamics, June, Grenoble.
2022:
  • Mathflows, Marseille Luminy, December.
  • VIII Conferencia de Matemáticos Ecuatorianos en París, September, Paris.
  • Summer school on fluids and turbulence, Lyon, June.
  • Mathematical Advances in Geophysical Flows, April, Marseille Luminy.
  • GDR EDP Conférence itinérante, February, Vannes.
2021:
  • VII Conferencia de Matemáticos Ecuatorianos en París, October, Paris.
  • Les Journées du GDR AFHP 2021, Besançon, September.

Administrative tasks

  • Part of the directorate of AMARUN, an association of Ecuadorian mathematicians.
  • Elected representative for PhD students at the Doctoral School of Mathematics Hadamard 2021-2022.
  • Elected representative for PhD students of the Graduate School of Mathematics Council.
